code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut current = ""
  mut has_digit = false
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if has_digit
          match string.parse_int(current)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          current = ""
          has_digit = false
        end
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        has_digit = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has_digit
    match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn remove_first(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut removed = false
  mut j = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while j < n
    match xs.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if v == target and not removed
        removed = true
      else
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_desc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    match list.max(remaining)
    when Some(m)
      result = list.push(result, m)
      remaining = remove_first(remaining, m)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  let sorted = sort_desc(nums)
  let total = sorted.len()
  mut take = k
  if take > total
    take = total
  end
  mut output = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < take
    match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        output = "#{v}"
      else
        output = "#{output} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print(output)
end
